sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me retract the track first, then move to Green's row
print("Retracting track...")
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])

# Check player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 18:
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  Player: center=({center_r}, {center_c})")
        break

# Check block positions
print("\n=== Blocks ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['R', 'b', 'N'] and n['pixels'] == 16:
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']}: center=({center_r}, {center_c})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
